subject: Saving Dee's Plumbing & Construction,Inc. time on after-hours call capture
body:
Hi Dee's Plumbing & Construction,Inc. team,

I work with service businesses in Rockford on one specific problem: dispatching jobs manually and missing after-hours calls.

I built a after-hours call capture and job dispatching automation system that capture every after-hours lead automatically and route jobs to the right tech without phone tag. Most businesses I work with see it running within a week.

Happy to show you a quick demo — no pitch, just a look at what it does. Interested?

Best,
Drew
